<smartphone>
  <model>Google Pixel 8</model>
  <releaseDate>[date]</releaseDate>
  <price>[price]</price>

  <features>

<product>
  <name>Google Pixel Latest</name>
  <releaseDate>[releaseDate]</releaseDate>
  <price>[price]</price>
  <features>
    <feature>Enhanced camera system</feature>
    <feature>Longer battery life</feature>
    <feature>Advanced AI capabilities</feature>
  </features>
  <availability>[availability]</availability>
</product>

<release>
  <model>Google Pixel 9</model>
  <launch_date>October 2024</launch_date>
  <base_price>[price]</base_price>
  <key_feature>Google Tensor G4 chip</key_feature>
  <camera_upgrade>50MP main sensor</camera_upgrade>
  <ai_capability>Enhanced on-device AI</ai_capability>
  <storage_options>[storage_gb]GB</storage_options>
  <color_variants>[color_name]</color_variants>
</release>
